questions.statement: Concentration of which of the following Green house gas is not directly influenced by human activities?

questions.explanation: Astronomical units is the distance between earth and the sun and is represented by the symbol A.

questions.statement: Pressure is measured in terms of
questions.explanation: <p>Pressure&nbsp;is defined as&nbsp;force&nbsp;per unit&nbsp;area. It is usually more convenient to use pressure&nbsp;rather than&nbsp;force&nbsp;to describe the influences upon fluid behaviour. The standard unit for&nbsp;pressure&nbsp;is the Pascal, which is a Newton per square meter</p>
